title: Elemental Wizards (More RPG Classes)
description: Master the elements to overcome your foes! Spell Engine Add-On
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PeZ4h4i0/images/b09828034bd59fb130f3e7b6ae0915431ec749ae.png)
## 🧙‍♂️🌊⛰️🌪️Master the elements to overcome your foes!
## Wizards (RPG-Series) Add-On for 3 new Elemental Wizard Sub-Classes (Earth, Water & Wind)
[![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/loader-fabric-black?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://fabricmc.net/)
[![Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/curseforge-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/elemental-wizards-rpg-class)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1209063880790376468?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=discord&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://discord.com/invite/AShKd5XrTu)
[![KoFi](https://img.shields.io/badge/donations-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://ko-fi.com/fichteee)
[![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://github.com/ProfessorFichte/Elemental-Wizards)
---
## 📂 Installation
- [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine 'Title')
- [More RPG Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-rpg-classes 'Title')
- [Azure Lib Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib-armor 'Title')
- [Wizards](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards 'Title')

## 👍Highly Recommended Mods
- [My More RPG Classes Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Fichte 'Title')
- [The whole RPG Series Project!](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr 'Title')
- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat 'Title')
- [Additional RPG Jewelry](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-rpg-jewelry)
- [Loot & Explore](https://modrinth.com/mod/loot-n-explore) & [LNE Wizards](https://modrinth.com/mod/lne-wizards)

---
## 🕹️ Features
### ✨Spells
- Make use of the different elemental Wizard-Spells to make fighting and combat more fun.
- The Water Wizard is a semi supporting & Healing Wizard, but he can also deal good damage!
- The Earth Wizard is a tanky CC, Damage over time oriented wizard, that is hard to kill.
- The Wind Wizard is a CC intensive class that relies on its combos of knockbacks & knockups.
- By equipping a Spell Book with a bound Spell-Pool or using Weapons with a bound Spell, you can cast the spells.
- To craft a Spell Book, search for a Spell Binding Table or craft a table! You'll need a book 
![Spell Pool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PeZ4h4i0/images/daad3ad820b6d4db0ceb6ae62c1dd24669262a85.png)

---
### 🤺Combat & Equipment
- Craft new Wands and Staffs for the air, earth and water element!
- Craft elemental runes, you´ll need them for spell casting.
- You should use Better Combat for the best experience!
- Weapons, Armor and Spells make use of the Air, Earth and Water Spell Power.
![ElementalWizards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PeZ4h4i0/images/172da99f5e00b466f6a0d964863486f9120bcfc2.png)
---

## 🤝Integrated Mod Compability
- [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend 'Title')
- [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether 'Title')
- [Zephyr](https://modrinth.com/mod/zephyr-mod 'Title') Thanks for Compat MuonR!

## ⚙️Configuration
<details>
<summary>File Locations</summary>
  
- **Armor & Weapon bonuses:**
- _config/elemental_wizards_rpg/items.json
- **Status Effect values:**
- _config/elemental_wizards_rpg/effects.json
- **Loot Injections:**
- _config/rpg_series/loot.json
- Spells can be configurated via datapacks!
</details>
